# Security Policy

## Reporting A Vulnerability

Please report suspected security issues to `support@kognitos.com`.

When possible, include:

- a short description of the issue
- affected files or workflows
- reproduction steps
- impact assessment

Please do not open public GitHub issues for security-sensitive reports.

## Scope

This repository primarily contains skills, packaging metadata, and lightweight validation scripts. Security reports are still welcome for:

- plugin packaging behavior
- validation scripts
- repository automation
- documentation that could cause unsafe usage patterns
